rationale: Both correctly flag the redundant no-comment `change` (comul_includeRight:170, confirmed redundant with the rfl includeRight_apply simp) and the defeq/simpa fragility in antipode_comp (lines 47-55); acting on either produces materially stronger proofs. Review 2's additional demands (refactor ext+induction+simp in map_id/map_comp and document final simp) are stylistic/contested for private lemmas and would yield no meaningfully better merged PR.
